title: geranium pulchellum
intro: Geranium pulchellum, also known as the small- or dwarf-geranium, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Geranium pulchellum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in topical applications like creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
